heading: Service of process
label: 140710 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14071036:5004., , .Oct. 23, 1992Pub. L. 102–484, title XVIII, § 1804106 Stat. 2582The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
